segments.text: I mean, it's good that you're getting the damage, but not the kill, yo.
I don't want to think these trades are exactly the best deal for you, you know?
But that's it, there we go, two-framer on game.

full_text: I mean, it's good that you're getting the damage, but not the kill, yo. I don't want to think these trades are exactly the best deal for you, you know? But that's it, there we go, two-framer on game.
